title: Anthropic Files For An IPO: Rapid Reaction — With M.G. Siegler
summary: Alex Kantrowitz and M.G. Siegler discuss Anthropic's IPO filing, analyzing the timing of going public before OpenAI, the competitive position of Claude, and Anthropic's capital needs.
